snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real “owners of the song” have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu
Cheif Ad - Sourav Dheer 
1st Ad - Jass
Dop - Munish Shunty
Editor - CutsbyNav ( Navraj)
Colorist - Mr Luv
Production- Kainth Production ( Gagan)
Choreographer- Amit syal
Jib - Sonu
Makeup - Guru and Team
Hair - Sahil ( Barber king )
Art director - Kaka Art
Costume- Rajat Manchanda
Camera - cenidream
Focus puller - Gaggu
Editor - Cuts By Nav
VFX  - Rahul (the.vfx.wala)
BTS - J Singh & Ashu Dadwal
USA production: 
Front Line Production @spicegridproductions @gigipanwar
Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To
Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Tere Paida Mein ye Paid
Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit
Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein
Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyaar Aale Gaane Main To
Gaan Laagi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala
Bhoot Mere Pe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe
Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Manne Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh
Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera
Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Doob Gaya Main Billi Billi
Aankhya Mein Bairan
Teri Hansi Ke Hansi
Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe
Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Mein
Pair bhi na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe
Ghane Bair Chhori Re
Tu Fursat Te Ghadi
I Think Meri Jaan
Hoth Tere Laal
Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid
Tu Mila ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane
Main Sync Meri Jaan

ho Aankhya Aalya Maarya
Tanne Teer Chhore Re
Mere Dil Ne yu Gaya
Jama Cheer Chhore Re
ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe
Manne Kuch Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage
Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re
Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Mein
Dive Makha Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Kise Paache Itne Na Phire
Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

#sheesha #mittaror #sorika #sorabbedi #niharikatiwari #trending2026 #viralharyanvi #newmusic

snippet.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
snippet.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D’Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director’s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


“Timi Ho”  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

“Timi Ho” is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Teaser | Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 10 Apr
snippet.description:
Laughter, screams, and surprises are waiting inside the Bangla. Dare to enter? 🤣🧟‍♀️
#BhoothBanglaTeaser out now!

#BhoothBangla in cinemas on 10th April 2026 👻

Bhooth Bangla reunites #AkshayKumar with acclaimed director #Priyadarshan after 14 years, promising a delightful blend of comedy, horror, and thrill.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor
Co-producer: Vimal Doshi, Farahjaan Sheikh, Vedant Vikaas Baali
Group CEO & CFO (BTL): Sanjay Dwivedi
Director of Photography: Divakar Mani
Story by: Aakash Kaushik
Screenplay by: Priyadarshan, Rohan Shankar, Abilash Nair
Dialogues by: Rohan Shankar
Music: Pritam
Lyrics: Yitendra Mishra & Kumaar
Co-Director: Abilash Nair
Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Line Producers: Suresh Balaji & George Pius
Costume Designers: V Sai Babu, Dhanya Balakrishnan, Veera Kapur, Rimple & Harpreet
Sound Designers: Rajakrishnan & Shahaab Alam
Background Score: Ronnie Raphael

Digital Agency: Everymedia
Visual Promotions: Just Right Studioz NX

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
snippet.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Ghaamchhaya | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
This is me and the band performing “Ghaamchhaya” live at GhaamChhaya Intimate. It’s the title track from the album “GhaamChhaya,” and it talks about how someone’s absence can truly hurt. Accepting it hurts even more. I really love this song, and I hope you do too.

Stream GhaamChhaya on all streaming platforms now 

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Cello — Iva Maharjan
Violin — Pheobe Shrestha
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Mastered — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

snippet.title: KISAAN BAHURIYA OFFICIAL TRAILER I किसान बहुरिया I ANJANA SINGH I PRASHANT SINGH I BHOJPURI MOVIE
snippet.description:
#anjanasingh #prashantsingh #khushijha #golutiwari #kisaanbahuriya #manjulthakur #omjha #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpurisuperhitmovie 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म –  किसान बहुरिया (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – अंजना  सिंह  , प्रशांत  सिंह  , ख़ुशी झा  , विद्या  सिंह  , गोलू  तिवारी  , अशोक  मिश्रा  , सुधा  यादव  
बाल कलाकार - दीक्षा मिश्रा
निर्देशक – मंजुल ठाकुर
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
लेखक   - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव 
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान
कोरियोग्राफर – एम .के .गुप्ता (जॉय )
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - दास स्टूडियो
प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय  , सोनू  मिश्रा 
लोकल  प्रोडक्शन  –  मुकेश  दुबे  ,कमलेश  सिंह, दुष्यंत   सिंह   
आर्ट डायरेक्टर – नज़ीर शेख
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, मंजुल ठाकुर
 म्यूजिक – IVY MUSIC 
सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव

B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे
ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा 

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट - फाइनेंस  -
 प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी 

B4U - फाइनेंस-
 संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

FILM- KISAAN BAHURIYA (Bhojpuri film)
STARCAST- Anjana singh , Prashant singh , Khushijha , Vidhya singh , Golu tiwari , Ashok Mishra , Sudha Yadav , 
CHILD ARTIST – DIKSHA MISHRA 
DIRECTOR- MANJUL THAKUR 
CONCEPT – SANDEEP SINGH
WRITER - ARBIND TIWARI 
MUSIC DIRECTOR- OM JHA 
LYRICS – ARBIND TIWARI, PYARE LAL YADAV
EDITOR- SAMEER SHAIKH, ZAHEED KHAN
CINEMATOGRAPHER- IMRAN SHAGUN 
CHOREOGRAPHER- M.K GUPTA (JOY)
ART DIRECTOR- NAZEER SHAIKH 
POST PRODUCTION – DAS STUDIO
PRODUCTION CONTROLLER – ROSHAN ROY , SONU MISHRA
LOCAL PRODUCTION – MUKESH DUBEY, KAMLESH SINGH, DUSHYANT SINGH  
PRODUCER- SANDEEP SINGH, MANJUL THAKUR
Music, satellite and digital partner- B4U BHOJPURI

B4U CREATIVE TEAM 
MARUDA SHARMA ( E.P ), NEHA UPADHYAY, VISHAL YADAV 

B4U - LEGAL TEAM 
SANDEEP RANA , TRUSHNA PATEL , POONAM SHINDE , AKANKSHA WAKODE, MORE
OFFICE BOY - KANHAIYA JHA

IVY ENETERTAINMENT- FINANCE
PRADEEP K DAGA , JINELLE MASCARENHAS , VIPUL JAIN , NIVRUTTI PATIL , GANESH MAHADEV TAPRE , HIMANSHU CHAUDHARY


B4U – FINANCE TEAM
 SANTOSH GARG , RAVINDER SALVI, SAKSHI SHELAR 

         


Subscribe us - https://www.youtube.com/@b4ubhojpuri-
Follow us on Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/
Follow us on Instagram - https://www.facebook.com/B4UBhojpuri/

snippet.title: Lat Lag Gayee - 8K | Race 2 | Saif Ali Khan, Jacqueline | Benny Dayal, Shalmali | Pritam |Party Song
snippet.description:
Get Ready to Groove 🎶💃! Experience the Electric Chemistry of Saif Ali Khan and Jacqueline Fernandez in the Sizzling 'Lat Lag Gayee' Song from Race 2. 🔥🕺 Let the Rhythmic Beats Ignite the Dance Floor as they Set it on Fire! 🔥🔥

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits :
Singers : Benny Dayal & Shalmali Kholgade
Music Director : Pritam
Lyrics : Mayur Puri
Mixed & Mastered By Eric Pillai
Grooves and synths : Hyacinth D Souza with Aman Nath
Accordion - Milos Milivojevic with Nikhil Paul George 
Additional programming and Sound Design 
Dj Phukan with Sunny & Pritam
 
Movie Cast & Crew :

Directed by :  Abbas-Mustan
Produced By : Ramesh S. Taurani

Song Lyrics :

Be-Imaan
Dil Bada Be-Imaan
Hota Nahin Aasaan
Isey Hai Samjhana
 
Be-Imaan
Dil Bada Be-Imaan
Tere Liye Shaitan  
Meri Na Ik Maana...
 
Dil Jeetey Ya Main Jeetun
Dekhungi Dekhega Tu
Lo Dil Se Sharat Lag Gayee
 
Mujhe To Teri 
Lat Lag Gayee, Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee

Mujhe To Teri Lat Lag Gayee, Lat Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee
Mujhe To Teri

Jitna
Utni Bagawat Ho
Lagta Hai Aisa 
Haal Dil Ki Tum Zaroorat Ho...

Lagta Hai Aisa 
Haal Dil Ki Tum Zaroorat Ho...
 
Mujhko Bhi Tu Zaroori
Doobi Nashey Mein Poori
To Kaisi Ye Talab Lag Gayee?

Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee

Mujhe To Teri Lat Lag Gayee, Lag Gayee
Zamana Kahey Lat Ye Galat Lag Gayee 
Mujhe To Teri
La Aa Aa Ye...
 
Ik Tu 
Ik Main
Ik Baat Huyi Apni
Hairaan Hai Kyun
Saara Jahaan
Jo Raat Huyi Apni...
 
Ik Tu
Ik Main
Ik Baat Huyi Apni
Hairaan Hai Kyun
Saara Jahaan
Jo Raat Huyi Apni...

snippet.title: Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu
snippet.description:
Farkera Aauchhau Ki ( फर्केर आउँछौ कि ) || Ft. Gokarna Shrestha, Sumitra Tamang || Manish Limbu

🎵 Audio Credit 🎵
Lyrics/Music : Gokarna Shrestha
Vocal : Manish Limbu
Arrange : Sagar Sansar Rai
Mixed/Mastered : Sajan Shah
Flute : Ratna BK
Guitar : Sanjeev Baraili
Sarangi : Manish Gandarva
Recording  : Mahol Studio

🎬 Video Credit 🎬
Cast :     Gokarna Shrestha
               Sumitra Tamang

Guest Cast : Zimbey Rai
                       Rajendra Khadgi
                       Anjana Barailli

Story/Concept : Gokarna Shrestha
Direction: Suman Basnet 
Camera: Sanam Tamang & Team
Edit/Color : Bikash Dahal
Makeup Artist : Aakriti Khadka
Production Manager : Surya oli
Technial Head : Harka Pahari & Team
                       

Special Thanks :
                             Biswa Limbu ( Mero Online TV )
                             Kehar Sing Limbu
                             Binod Tamang 
                             Sujan Bhurtel
                             Nirajan Thapa
                             Diraj Limbu
                             Ramesh Regmi
                             Arjun Katuwal
                             Arjun Khadka
                             Ramesh Shrestha
                             Prince Leo
                             Milan Khadka
                             Aditya Thakuri
                             Neyushan Shrestha
                             Shivraj Dangi
                             Saugat Gautam
                             Dinesh Kathyat
                             Krish Kc
                             Ramesh Rai
                             Samir M. Tamang

                            Standard Khabar Media PVT. LTD
                                   Dami Khabar PVT.LTD
                                   Biswa Limbu Podcast
                                   Brothers Rental
                                   Hotel Chisopani
                           All My Facebook & Tiktok family

Song Lyrisc :
टाढा गयौ तिमी, मलाई छोडेर
 खाएका बाचा अनि, विश्वासलाई तोडेर
बिन्ती गर्छु तिमीलाई, दुई हात जोडेर
 फर्की आइदेउ प्रिय, बाटो मोडेर 

टाढै भएपनि, मनको माया मर्दैन
 अन्तै खुसी छौ भने, फर्की आउनु पर्दैन। 

नफर्किनेगरी गयौ, मैले चाहेरनि रोक्न सकिन,
 आँसुले कोरेको शब्दमा, तिमी नै तिमी छौ किन?

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

तिम्रो तस्बिर हेर्दै, रातभरि बोल्छु।
 कल्पनामै भएपनि, मनको कुरा खोल्छु।
 सम्झन्छु ती दिनहरू,जब साथमा तिमी थियौ
 माया माग्दा बदलामा, किन धोका दियौ 

 थाहा छ तिमी अब, फर्केर आउँदैन
 मैले जति आँसु बगाएनि, तिमीलाई पाउँदैन। 

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

खुसी हुनु जोसँग छौ, तिम्रो बाटो छेक्दिन
टाढै जानु मदेखि ,अब तिमीलाई रोक्दिन
 बिर्सिएरै जाउ मलाई, सम्झनामा नआओस्
मैले पाएजस्तो धोका, तिमीले नपाओस् 

 अर्को जन्म हुन्छ भने, भेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई,
 बदला लिन आफ्नै मुटु, रेट्नु छैन तिमीलाई
फाटेको मन अब, यादको सियोले सिउँदछु।
यो जुनी त केवल, तिम्रै नाममा जिउँदछु। 

बाँच्नु छैन अब मलाई मुटु दुखाएर
गाह्रो भो हाँस्न अब आँसु लुकाएर

फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो
 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

 फर्केर आउँछौ कि भन्ने, आश पनि मरेर गयो
मनदेखि माया गर्दा पनि, आज अधुरो भयो…

Tadha gayau timi, malai chhoder
Khayeka bacha ani, bishwaslai toder
Binti garchhu timilai, dui haat joder
Farki aideu priya, bato moder

Tadhai bhaepani, manko maya mardaina
Antai khusi chhau bhane, Farki aaunu pardaina

Nafarkine gari gayau, maile chahera ni rokna sakin
Aansule koreko shabdama, timi nai timi chhau kina?

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Timro tasbir herdai, raatbhari bolchhu
Kalpanamai bhaepani, manko kura kholchhu
Samjhinchhu ti dinharu, jaba saathma timi thiyau
Maya magda badlama, kina dhoka diyau

Thaha chha timi aba, Farkera aaudaina
Maile jati aansu bagaeni, timilai paaudaina

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo
Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo
Mandekhi maya garda pani, aaja adhuro bhayo…

Khusi hunu josanga chhau, timro bato chhekdina
Tadhai janu madekhi, aba timilai rokdina
Birsiera jau malai, samjhanama naaos
Maile paae jasto dhoka, timile napaos

Arko janma hunchha bhane, bhetna chhaina timilai
Badla lina aafnai mutu, retnu chhaina timilai
Fateko man aba, yaadko siyole siundchhu
Yo juni ta kebal, timrai naam ma jiundchhu

Bachnu chhaina aba malai mutu dukhaayera
Gahro bho haasna aba aansu lukaayera

Farkera aauchhau ki bhanne, aasha pani marera gayo

snippet.title: Timi Cheumai - NepRiff ( Official Lyric Video )
snippet.description:
Some feelings don’t need loud words…
Sometimes, just being cheumai is enough. 🤍
“Timi Cheumai” is a soft emotional song about silent love, unspoken understanding, and the comfort of someone’s presence. When words fail, the heart speaks through silence. This song captures that quiet warmth — where love flows without noise.
Close your eyes, feel the melody, and let the emotions breathe. 🌙✨

Available in Spotify 

https://open.spotify.com/track/0ql2CHqHLZ46v6u09PhP7U?si=dMDipIkmT2alsuVLRTmCtw

snippet.description:
Bhooth Bangla Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Akshay Kumar with Director Priyadarshan is set for Bhooth Bangla Franchise with Tabu & Wamiqa Gabbi in Mysterious Roles of Horror Comedy & Suspense- Bhooth Bangla Teaser is pure Nostalgia of Bhool Bhulaiyaa but falls short in editing & establishing connection of Old Characters in new story. snippet.title: Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Lukas Graham - 7 Years (Lyrics)

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old


Stream & Download "7 Years" by Lukas Graham: https://lukasgraham.ln...

Lets Support and Follow Lukas Graham:
https://www.instagram.com/lukasgraham
https://www.x.com/lukasgraham
https://www.facebook.com/lukasgraham

#7Years #LukasGraham #Lyrics #TikTok #Tiktokhymn

Lyrics:
Lukas Graham
"7 Years"

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

It was a big big world, but we thought we were bigger
Pushing each other to the limits, we were learning quicker
By eleven smoking herb and drinking burning liquor
Never rich so we were out to make that steady figure

Once I was eleven years old, my daddy told me
"Go get yourself a wife or you'll be lonely"
Once I was eleven years old

I always had that dream, like my daddy before me
So I started writing songs, I started writing stories
Something about that glory just always seemed to bore me
'Cause only those I really love will ever really know me

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
Before the morning sun, when life was lonely
Once I was twenty years old

(Lukas Graham!)

I only see my goals, I don't believe in failure
'Cause I know the smallest voices, they can make it major
I got my boys with me, at least those in favor
And if we don't meet before I leave, I hope I'll see you later

Once I was twenty years old, my story got told
I was writing 'bout everything I saw before me
Once I was twenty years old

Soon we'll be thirty years old, our songs have been sold
We've traveled around the world and we're still roaming
Soon we'll be thirty years old

I'm still learning about life
My woman brought children for me
So I can sing them all my songs
And I can tell them stories
Most of my boys are with me
Some are still out seeking glory
And some I had to leave behind
My brother, I'm still sorry

Soon I'll be sixty years old, my daddy got sixty-one
Remember life, and then your life becomes a better one
I made a man so happy when I wrote a letter once
I hope my children come and visit once or twice a month

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Soon I'll be sixty years old, will I think the world is cold
Or will I have a lot of children who can warm me?
Soon I'll be sixty years old

Once I was seven years old, my mama told me
"Go make yourself some friends or you'll be lonely"
Once I was seven years old

Once I was seven years old

📷 Image/Wallpaper Source: Unsplash.com

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke…
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke…. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke …. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke…
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

► About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa’s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SEMI FINALS | Day 4 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SEMI FINALS of BGIS 2026 begin.

The competition tightens. The stakes rise. There is no margin for error now.

After battling through The Grind, Round stages, Quarter Finals and Wildcard, only the strongest remain. Every match carries weight. Every fight moves teams one step closer to the Grand Finals.

This is where contenders turn into finalists.

Watch the SEMI FINALS live and witness who takes the next step toward the championship stage.

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

Music Provided by https://www.extrememusic.com

snippet.title: Lauv - I Like Me Better
snippet.description:
Lauv - I Like Me Better

(Lyrics)
[Verse 1]
To be young and in love in New York City
To not know who I am but still know that I'm good long as you're here with me
To be drunk and in love in New York City
Midnight into morning coffee
Burnin' through the hours talkin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Verse 2]
I don't know what it is, but I got that feelin'
Wakin' up in this bed next to you, swear the room, yeah, it got no ceilin'
If we lay, let the day just pass us by
I might get to too much talkin'
I might have to tell you somethin' (Damn)

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better when I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Drop]

[Bridge]
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Stay awhile, stay awhile, oh
Stay awhile, stay awhile, stay here with me
Lay here with me, ayy, ayy, ooh

[Chorus]
I like me better when I'm with you (Yes, I do, yes, I do, baby)
I like me better when I'm with you (Oh no)
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I'm with you

[Outro]
(I like me, I like me)
(Look who you made me, made me, oh no)
Better when
I like me better when I'm with you

Tags:

Lauv I Like Me Better
I Like Me Better Lauv
Stay awhile stay awhile stay here with me
Lay here with me ayy ayy ooh
I like me better when I'm with you
I like me better
When I'm with you
I knew from the first time
I'd stay for a long time 'cause
I like me better when
I like me better when I am with you
I Like Me Better

#Lauv #ILikeMeBetter #Lyrics

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
➽ Twitter - @dream
➽ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

ko.title: 마인크래프트 스피드러너 VS 헌터 6명
ko.description:
마인크래프트 스피드러너 VS 헌터 6명. 여러분이 원하던 바로 그 시리즈의 연장선이죠. 이번 건 진짜 미쳤습니다.

제 SNS를 팔로우하세요.
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

배드보이헤일로:  @thesaintsofgames
조지:  @GeorgeNotFound
샙냅:  @Sapnap
앤트프로스트:  @Antfrost
어샘듀드:  @awesamdude
캡틴퍼피:  @CaptainPuffy

이 시리즈를 '마인크래프트 맨헌트'라고 부르기로 했습니다. 이 영상은 원조 마인크래프트 맨헌트의 새로운 변주 버전으로, 세 명의 헌터, 혹은 한 명의 헌터가 아닌, 무려 여섯 명의 헌터가 등장하죠.

이건 1.21.11 버전에서 진행된 새로운 '마인크래프트, 하지만...' 챌린지입니다. 제 친구 조지와 샙냅과 배드보이헤일로와 앤트프로스트와 어샘듀드와 캡틴퍼피가 저를 방해하는 동안, 저는 게임을 깨려고 노력합니다. 정말 치열했고, 동시에 엄청 재미있는 대결이었습니다. 이 챌린지들을 하는 게 정말 즐거워요.

이 영상에 500,000개의 좋아요를 받으면 재대결을 할 예정입니다!

’마인크래프트, 하지만 해수면이 올라간다’, 또는 ‘마인크래프트, 하지만 용암이 차오른다’와 같은 ‘마인크래프트, 하지만’ 챌린지와는 다릅니다. 이건 스피드러너와 그를 죽이려는 암살자의 추격전입니다.

bn.title: মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার
bn.description:
মাইনক্রাফ্ট  স্পিডরানার ভার্সেস ৬ জন হান্টার। তোমরা এটা চেয়েছিলে। সিরিজের পুনরজীবন। একটা অত্যন্ত চমৎকার ছিল।

আমার সোশ্যালগুলি ফলো করো:
➽ টুইটার - @unknown-role
➽ ইনস্টাগ্রাম - @unknown-rolewastaken
➽ স্ন্যাপচ্যাট- @unknown-rolepublic

পণ্যসামগ্রী: https://dream.shop/

ব্যাডবইহেলো:  @thesaintsofgames
জর্জ:  @GeorgeNotFound
স্যাপন্যাপ:  @Sapnap
অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট:  @Antfrost
অসমডুড:  @awesamdude
ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি:  @CaptainPuffy

আমরা এই সিরিজকে মাইনক্রাফ্ট ম্যানহান্ট বলার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি । এই  ভিডিওটি কারি আরেক রূপ, যেখানে ৬ জন হান্টার আছে চীন অথবা একজনের বদলে।
এটি একটি নতুন Minecraft 1.21.11 চ্যালেঞ্জ যা আমরা চেষ্টা করার সিদ্ধান্ত নিয়েছি। আমি গেমটি জেতার চেষ্টা করি, আর আমার বন্ধু জর্জ, স্যাপন্যাপ, ব্যাডবয়হেলো, অ্যান্টফ্রস্ট, অসমডুড এবং ক্যাপ্টেন পাফি আমাকে বাধা দেওয়ার চেষ্টা করে। এটি মূলত একটি দৌড় প্রতিযোগিতা, এটি অত্যন্ত উত্তেজনাপূর্ণ ছিল এবং আমরা প্রচুর মজা করেছি। আমি এই ধরনের চ্যালেঞ্জগুলো করতে খুব পছন্দ করি।
যদি এই ভিডিওতে ৫০০,০০০ লাইক পড়ে, তবে আমরা আবার এর একটি ফিরতি ম্যাচ  খেলব!
এটি "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু জল বাড়ছে" বা "মাইনক্রাফট, কিন্তু লাভা বাড়ছে"—এই ধরণের কোনো চ্যালেঞ্জ নয়। এটি একজন খুনি বা আততায়ীর বিরুদ্ধে মাইনক্রাফটের একজন স্পিডরানার-এর টিকে থাকার লড়াই।

ro.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Vânători

Am decis să numim seria Minecraft Manhunt. Videoul este o rendiție diferită a acestuia unde avem ȘASE vânători în loc de TREI vânători sau doar unul.

#MinecraftManhunt

te.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
te.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. మీరు దాని కోసం అడిగారు. సిరీస్ కొనసాగింపు. ఇది పూర్తిగా పిచ్చిగా ఉంది.

నా సోషల్ మీడియాను అనుసరించండి:
➽ Twitter - @Dream
➽ Instagram - @Dreamwastaken
➽ Snapchat - @Dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop/

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames
George: @GeorgeNotFound
Sapnap: @Sapnap
Antfrost: @Antfrost
awesamdude: @awesamdude
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy

మేము ఈ సిరీస్‌ను Minecraft Manhunt అని పిలవాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. ఈ వీడియో దాని యొక్క భిన్నమైన వెర్షన్, ఇక్కడ ముగ్గురు వేటగాళ్ళు లేదా ఒకరు మాత్రమే కాకుండా ఆరుగురు వేటగాళ్ళు ఉన్నారు.

ఇది కొత్త Minecraft కానీ, 1.21.11 సవాలును మేము ప్రయత్నించాలని నిర్ణయించుకున్నాము. నేను ఆటలో గెలవడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తాను, నా స్నేహితుడు జార్జ్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు సప్నాప్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు బాడ్‌బాయ్‌హాలో మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు ఆంట్‌ఫ్రాస్ట్ మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు అద్భుతం మరియు నా స్నేహితుడు కెప్టెన్‌పఫీ నన్ను అలా చేయకుండా నిరోధించడానికి ప్రయత్నిస్తారు. ఇది ఒక రేసు, మరియు ఇది చాలా తీవ్రంగా ఉంటుంది మరియు మేము చాలా నవ్వుకున్నాము. ఈ సవాళ్లను చేయడం నాకు చాలా ఇష్టం.

ఈ వీడియోకు 500,000 లైక్‌లు వస్తే, మనం తిరిగి మ్యాచ్ చేస్తాము!

మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ కాదు, కానీ వాటర్ రైజెస్ లేదా మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్, కానీ లావా రైజెస్, లేదా మరేదైనా కానీ అలాంటి సవాలు. ఇది కిల్లర్ / హంతకుడిపై మైన్‌క్రాఫ్ట్ యొక్క స్పీడ్ రన్ / స్పీడ్ రన్నర్.

#MinecraftManhunt

இந்தத் தொடரை Minecraft Manhunt என்று அழைக்க முடிவு செய்தோம். இந்த வீடியோ அதன் வித்தியாசமான பதிப்பாகும், அங்கு மூன்று வேட்டைக்காரர்களுக்குப் பதிலாக ஆறு வேட்டைக்காரர்கள் அல்லது ஒருவர் மட்டுமே உள்ளனர்.

இது ஒரு புதிய Minecraft ஆனால், 1.21.11 சவாலை நாங்கள் முயற்சிக்க முடிவு செய்துள்ளோம். நான் விளையாட்டை வெல்ல முயற்சிக்கிறேன், அதே நேரத்தில் என் நண்பர் ஜார்ஜ் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் சப்னாப் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் பேட்பாய்ஹாலோ மற்றும் என் நண்பர் ஆண்ட்ஃப்ரோஸ்ட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் அவெசம்டுட் மற்றும் என் நண்பர் கேப்டன் பஃபி நான் அதைச் செய்வதைத் தடுக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்கள். இது ஒரு பந்தயம், இது மிகவும் தீவிரமானது, எங்களுக்கு நிறைய சிரிப்புகள் இருந்தன. இந்த சவால்களைச் செய்வது எனக்கு மிகவும் பிடிக்கும்.

இந்த வீடியோ 500,000 லைக்குகளைப் பெற்றால், நாங்கள் மீண்டும் ஒரு போட்டியை நடத்துவோம்!

மைன்கிராஃப்ட் அல்ல, ஆனால் வாட்டர் ரைசஸ் அல்லது மைன்கிராஃப்ட், ஆனால் லாவா ரைசஸ், அல்லது வேறு ஏதேனும் ஆனால் அது போன்ற சவால். இது ஒரு கொலையாளி / கொலையாளிக்கு எதிரான மைன்கிராஃப்டின் வேக ஓட்டம் / வேக ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்.

Nếu video này được 500,000 lượt like thì bọn tôi sẽ tái đấu!

It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

snippet.title: Maan Panu - The Last Letter (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
‘The Last Letter’ is about the words we never said, and the love that never really leaves. This is for anyone who has ever held on to that one last feeling… that one last memory… that one last letter.

STREAM NOW: https://va.lnk.to/thelastletter

Song Name: The Last Letter
Artist: Maan Panu
Lyrics: Maan Panu
Music Producer: Mazaak
Composed by: Maan Panu
Recording Engineer: Samir Dharap at Input One
Mixed & Mastered by: Hanish Taneja at Studio Alika

Video Credits:

Directed by: Tushar Ronak
DOP: Arjun Thaper
Editor: cowboy
Colourist: Samiran Sonowal
VFX: Jai Ni9e & Cyrad
Assistant Director: Shaharyar Ahmed Chauhan
2nd AD: Aryesh, Jay, & Luvya Sharma
3rd AD: Ojasvi Yadav

Art Director: Rupansh Kumar
Production Design: Lighthouse Studios
Assistant Art Director: Divit Chopra
Art Intern: Ojasvi
HMU: Kirti Rajor
Makeup Assistant: Ayushi Singh, Mahi Chandra, Somya Chandra
BTS and Stills: Chirag Singh

Female Lead: Kanchan Tomar

Lyrics:

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum sham subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Tune na jaana tere jaane se kya kya hua
Kitni kahani bani kitna tamasha hua
Jaane tu kaisi hogi aur voh deewana tera
Khush tu bhi kya hi hogi aur kya salona jahan

Mera sara badan tha so raha
Bas aankh reh gayi thi
Aisa lag raha tha mar gaye
Bas saans reh gayi thi

Tum phool chura ke chal diye
Bas shaakh reh gayi thi
Tum shama bujha ke chal diye
Bas raakh reh gayi thi

Ek baat reh gayi thi
Chup chaap reh gayi thi
Tum shaam subah sab le gaye
Bas raat reh gayi thi

Bas yaad reh gayi thi
Be hisaab reh gayi thi
Tum saare mausam le gaye
Barsaat reh gayi thi

Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya
Mere haathon ki laqeerein likh di uss khuda ne
Bas tera naam reh gaya

snippet.title: OMG! Blox Fruits Owner CURSED My SERVER + THIS HAPPENED..! ☠️
snippet.description:
OMG! Blox Fruits Owner CURSED My SERVER + THIS HAPPENED..! ☠️


+ sorry i havent post for 9 days video too busy in real life job + i took also a bit break xD but now i'am back + all clip what you see today its from day 1 clip xD didnt play much + some clip i cant post here because have copyright song in there 

#bloxfruits #roblox
tags: Blox Fruits I Got Dragon Fruit
Blox Fruits I got Triple Dark Blade
Blox Fruits Owner Cursed my server

ja.title: なんてことだ！Blox Fruitsのオーナーが私のサーバーに呪いをかけた！そしてこんなことが起こった…！☠️
ja.description:
なんてこった！Blox Fruitsのオーナーが私のサーバーに呪いをかけた！こんなことが起こった…！☠️

+ 9日間動画を投稿できなくてごめんなさい。現実の仕事が忙しかったんです。+ ちょっと休憩も取ってました xD でも今は戻ってきました + 今日お見せするクリップは全部初日のクリップです xD あまりプレイしていませんでした + 著作権のある曲が入っているので、ここに投稿できないクリップもあります

#bloxfruits #roblox

uk.title: О, БОЖЕ! Власник Blox Fruits ПРОКЛЯВ МІЙ СЕРВЕР + ЦЕ СТАЛОСЯ..! ☠️
uk.description:
О БОЖЕ! Власник Blox Fruits ПРОКЛЯВ МІЙ СЕРВЕР + ЦЕ СТАЛОСЯ..! ☠️

+ вибачте, що не публікував відео 9 днів, надто зайнятий на роботі в реальному житті + я також взяв невелику перерву xD, але тепер я повернувся + всі кліпи, які ви бачите сьогодні, це з першого дня xD не дуже багато переглядав + деякі кліпи я не можу опублікувати тут, бо там є пісня, захищена авторським правом

#bloxfruits #roblox

hi.title: हे भगवान! ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स के मालिक ने मेरे सर्वर को श्राप दिया और ये सब हो गया..! ☠️
hi.description:
हे भगवान! ब्लॉक्स फ्रूट्स के मालिक ने मेरे सर्वर को श्राप दिया + ये सब हुआ..! ☠️

+ माफ़ करना, मैंने 9 दिनों से वीडियो पोस्ट नहीं किया, असल ज़िंदगी में काम में बहुत व्यस्त थी + मैंने थोड़ा ब्रेक भी लिया था xD लेकिन अब मैं वापस आ गई हूँ + आज जो भी क्लिप आप देख रहे हैं वो पहले दिन की हैं xD ज़्यादा नहीं खेली + कुछ क्लिप मैं यहाँ पोस्ट नहीं कर सकती क्योंकि उनमें कॉपीराइट वाला गाना है

#bloxfruits #roblox

bn.title: ওহ! ব্লক্স ফ্রুটসের মালিক আমার সার্ভারকে অভিশাপ দিয়েছেন + এটা ঘটেছে..! ☠️
bn.description:
ওহ! ব্লক্স ফ্রুটসের মালিক আমার সার্ভারকে অভিশাপ দিয়েছেন + এটা হয়েছে..! ☠️

+ দুঃখিত, বাস্তব জীবনের কাজে ব্যস্ত থাকার কারণে ৯ দিন ধরে ভিডিও পোস্ট করিনি + আমিও একটু বিরতি নিয়েছিলাম xD কিন্তু এখন ফিরে এসেছি + আজ যা দেখছো সব ক্লিপ প্রথম দিনের ক্লিপ xD খুব বেশি চালানো হয়নি + কিছু ক্লিপ আমি এখানে পোস্ট করতে পারছি না কারণ সেখানে কপিরাইট গান আছে 

#ব্লক্সফ্রুটস #রোব্লক্স

de-DE.title: Oh mein Gott! Der Besitzer von Blox Fruits hat meinen Server verflucht + DAS IST PASSIERT..! ☠️
de-DE.description:
OMG! Der Besitzer von Blox Fruits hat meinen Server verflucht + DAS IST PASSIERT..! ☠️

+ Tut mir leid, dass ich 9 Tage lang kein Video gepostet habe, ich war beruflich sehr eingespannt + Ich habe auch eine kleine Pause eingelegt xD Aber jetzt bin ich zurück + Alle Clips, die ihr heute seht, sind vom ersten Tag xD Ich habe nicht viel gespielt + Einige Clips kann ich hier nicht posten, da sie urheberrechtlich geschützte Musik enthalten

#bloxfruits #roblox

ko.title: 세상에! 블록스 프루츠(Blox Fruits) 운영자가 내 서버에 저주를 걸었어! 이런 일이 벌어졌어..! ☠️
ko.description:
세상에! 블록스 프루츠 운영자가 제 서버에 저주를 걸었어요! 이런 일이 벌어졌어요..! ☠️

+ 9일 동안 영상을 올리지 못해서 죄송해요. 현실 생활에서 일하느라 너무 바빴고, 잠깐 쉬기도 했어요. xD 하지만 이제 돌아왔습니다. + 오늘 보시는 영상은 전부 첫날 영상이에요. xD 많이 플레이하진 않았거든요. + 저작권이 있는 노래가 포함된 영상은 여기에 올릴 수 없어요.

#bloxfruits #roblox

nl-NL.title: OMG! De eigenaar van Blox Fruits heeft mijn server vervloekt + DIT IS ER GEBEURD..! ☠️
nl-NL.description:
OMG! De eigenaar van Blox Fruits heeft mijn server vervloekt + DIT is er gebeurd..! ☠️

+ Sorry dat ik 9 dagen geen video heb geplaatst, ik was te druk met mijn werk in het echte leven + ik heb ook even een pauze genomen xD maar nu ben ik terug + alle clips die je vandaag ziet, zijn van dag 1 xD ik heb niet veel gespeeld + sommige clips kan ik hier niet plaatsen omdat er auteursrechtelijk beschermde muziek in zit

#bloxfruits #roblox

it.title: OMG! Il proprietario di Blox Fruits ha maledetto il mio server + è successo questo..! ☠️
it.description:
Oddio! Il proprietario di Blox Fruits ha maledetto il mio server! E poi è successo questo! ☠️

Scusate se non ho pubblicato video per 9 giorni, ero troppo impegnato con il lavoro nella vita reale. Mi sono anche preso una piccola pausa xD ma ora sono tornato. Tutte le clip che vedete oggi sono del primo giorno xD non ho giocato molto. Alcune clip non posso pubblicarle qui perché contengono musica protetta da copyright.

#bloxfruits #roblox

pl.title: O mój Boże! Właściciel Blox Fruits PRZEKLĄŁ MÓJ SERWER + TO SIĘ STAŁO...! ☠️
pl.description:
O mój Boże! Właściciel Blox Fruits PRZEKLĘŁ MÓJ SERWER + TO SIĘ STAŁO...! ☠️

+ Przepraszam, że nie wrzucałem filmów przez 9 dni, byłem zbyt zajęty pracą w realu + zrobiłem sobie też małą przerwę xD, ale teraz wróciłem + wszystkie klipy, które widzicie dzisiaj, pochodzą z pierwszego dnia xD Nie odtwarzały się zbyt wiele + niektóre klipy nie mogą się tu znaleźć, bo zawierają utwór chroniony prawami autorskimi

#bloxfruits #roblox

fr-FR.title: Oh mon Dieu ! Le propriétaire de Blox Fruits a maudit mon serveur et voilà ce qui s'est passé… ! ☠️
fr-FR.description:
Oh mon Dieu ! Le propriétaire de Blox Fruits a jeté un sort sur mon serveur ! Et voilà ce qui s'est passé… ! ☠️

Désolée pour mon absence de 9 jours, j'étais très occupée par mon travail. J'ai aussi fait une petite pause xD Mais me revoilà ! Toutes les séquences que vous voyez aujourd'hui datent du premier jour xD Je n'ai pas beaucoup joué. Certaines séquences sont interdites car elles contiennent des musiques protégées par des droits d'auteur.

#bloxfruits #roblox

iw.title: אלוהים אדירים! בעל Blox Fruits קילל את השרת שלי + זה קרה..! ☠️
iw.description:
אלוהים אדירים! בעל Blox Fruits קילל את השרת שלי + זה קרה..! ☠️

+ סליחה שלא פרסמתי סרטון במשך 9 ימים, עסוק מדי בעבודה בחיים האמיתיים + לקחתי גם הפסקה קטנה xD אבל עכשיו חזרתי + כל הקטעים, מה שראיתם היום זה מהקליפ של היום הראשון xD לא שיחקתי הרבה + כמה קטעים אני לא יכול לפרסם כאן כי יש שם שיר עם זכויות יוצרים

#bloxfruits #roblox

pt-BR.title: Meu Deus! O dono do Blox Fruits amaldiçoou meu servidor e isso aconteceu! ☠️
pt-BR.description:
MEU DEUS! O dono do Blox Fruits amaldiçoou meu servidor! + ISSO ACONTECEU..! ☠️

+ Desculpem por não ter postado vídeo por 9 dias, estou muito ocupado com o trabalho na vida real + também tirei um tempinho de folga xD mas agora estou de volta + todos os vídeos que vocês veem hoje são do primeiro dia xD não joguei muito + alguns vídeos eu não posso postar aqui porque têm músicas com direitos autorais

#bloxfruits #roblox

ar.title: يا إلهي! مالك لعبة Blox Fruits شتم خادمي + حدث هذا..! ☠️
ar.description:
يا إلهي! مالك لعبة Blox Fruits شتم خادمي! وهذا ما حدث! ☠️

+ آسف لعدم نشر أي فيديو لمدة 9 أيام، كنت مشغولاً جداً بعملي، وأخذت استراحة قصيرة أيضاً xD لكنني عدت الآن. + جميع المقاطع التي ترونها اليوم هي من اليوم الأول xD لم ألعبها كثيراً. + بعض المقاطع لا يمكنني نشرها هنا لأنها تحتوي على موسيقى محمية بحقوق الطبع والنشر.

#bloxfruits #roblox

en.title: OMG! Blox Fruits Owner CURSED My SERVER + THIS HAPPENED..! ☠️
en.description:
OMG! Blox Fruits Owner CURSED My SERVER + THIS HAPPENED..! ☠️


+ sorry i havent post for 9 days video too busy in real life job + i took also a bit break xD but now i'am back + all clip what you see today its from day 1 clip xD didnt play much + some clip i cant post here because have copyright song in there 

#bloxfruits #roblox

es-US.title: ¡Dios mío! ¡El dueño de Blox Fruits maldijo mi servidor y pasó esto! ☠️
es-US.description:
¡Dios mío! ¡El dueño de Blox Fruits maldijo mi servidor! ¡Y pasó esto! ☠️

+ Perdón por no haber subido videos en 9 días, estaba muy ocupada con mi trabajo. + También me tomé un pequeño descanso xD, pero ya estoy de vuelta. + Todos los clips que ven hoy son del primer día xD, no jugué mucho. + Algunos clips no puedo publicarlos aquí porque tienen canciones con derechos de autor.

#bloxfruits #roblox

id.title: Ya ampun! Pemilik Blox Fruits mengutuk serverku + ini yang terjadi..! ☠️
id.description:
OMG! Pemilik Blox Fruits MENGUTUK SERVER SAYA + INI TERJADI..! ☠️

+ Maaf saya tidak mengunggah video selama 9 hari karena terlalu sibuk dengan pekerjaan di kehidupan nyata + Saya juga sempat istirahat sebentar xD tapi sekarang saya kembali + Semua klip yang kalian lihat hari ini berasal dari klip hari pertama xD Saya tidak banyak bermain + Beberapa klip tidak bisa saya unggah di sini karena ada lagu yang dilindungi hak cipta di dalamnya

#bloxfruits #roblox

ru.title: О боже! Владелец Blox Fruits проклял мой сервер, и вот что произошло..! ☠️
ru.description:
О боже! Владелец Blox Fruits проклял мой сервер! + Вот что случилось..! ☠️

+ Извините, что не выкладывала видео 9 дней, была слишком занята на работе + я также немного отдохнула xD, но теперь я вернулась + Все клипы, которые вы видите сегодня, взяты из первого дня xD Я мало играла + Некоторые клипы я не могу выложить здесь, потому что в них есть защищенная авторским правом музыка.

#bloxfruits #roblox

snippet.description:
Today I spent alot of robux trying to make a private island. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: VEK X @swar5729 - SWAR | Prod by pozod
snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey we’ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek ✖️ Swar — two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

PROD mix master : Pozod
KEYS : santosh tamang
Written & Composed : Swapnil Sharma
Shot by : ZAY & Acies ( Aurora production )

ClassX RUSH Live – Final EP
Vek ✖️ Swar  one stage, one moment, one memory.

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization
snippet.description:
435th eggchan hostage situation 

Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Player Civilization

Unstable SMP:
➜  @FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨@ParrotX2  
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prey - Beutezug https://youtu.be/TqrNKC7kybk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

LYRICS📝
मेरा आँखा काली काली, मेरा आँखामा गजली, मेरा सैयाँ वन्डरफुल, मुई त सैयाँकी दिलवाली x 2 
सैयाँलाई सब कुरबान, मेरा सैयाँ परान, सैयाँ स्वीटहार्ट, जान सैयाँ भौत निका र्यान...

अ!  तु पन छाड कम काँ छै, रेखा थापा झै लागिरैछै
 बारुलि कम्मर भाच्चि धै, सुदुरकी छोर्याट्टि जोरकी छै
 कि ल्याईदिउ तुखि साडि कि लेहेङ्गा, निधारमी लाईदिउ कि चम्किने बिन्दा, 
 हिरुनि बनौलो तुलाई,फिलम सुपरहिट होलो फिलम तु जन गरे चिन्ता, 
सोधिहाल घर मम्मिखि छरबट्ट होलो नति गालिकि 
आउनि ब!  झाने है त Longdrive मा गाडिमा घुमौछ तेरो सैया जी...

ओ सैयाँ, ओ सैयाँ, रैछौ जालि ओ सैयाँ, ताम्रा मिठा बोलिमा फसिग्या, ओ सैयाँ।

 बैतडीकी बसन्ती जसी दङग भए तेरो रुपरङग धेकी
 क्याई है मुलाई हेरेकि हेरेई ब!  तु त मेरी Fan भयेजसी
 सैयाका बजेराठ जमानाका सौकार चर्चा बताए यामुणी 
 होइझान्छ चौताल, घण्टी बजुन्थ्यो फोनमा Attend नगरेले ढलुन्थ्यो सरकार  भुणेको मेरो माण्णीकन बेडापार होलो तेरो जाण्णीकन मौका आउदैन फर्केर रानिबनी बसली सुण्णीकन
 मुईबिना कसरी बाचली भुणदिन्छु आज मेरा मनकी बोली 
 Collage Time माई पडिगैथ्यो Love जब धेक्या थे तेरी
 आखी काली.........

मेरा आँखा काली काली, मेरा आँखामा गजली, मेरा सैयाँ वन्डरफुल, 
मुई त सैयाँकी दिलवाली x 2 

All Rights Reserved © Ratotato Station Music 2026

#saiyaanwonderful #dotelirapsong #ratotatostation #roetsaudsong #sudurpashchim

सैयाँलाई सब कुरबान, मेरा सैयाँ परान, सैयाँ स्वीटहार्ट, जान सैयाँ भौत निका र्यान...

सोधिहाल घर मम्मिखि छरबट्ट होलो नति गालिकि 
आउनि ब!  झाने है त Longdrive मा गाडिमा घुमौछ तेरो सैया जी...

ओ सैयाँ, ओ सैयाँ, रैछौ जालि ओ सैयाँ, ताम्रा मिठा बोलिमा फसिग्या, ओ सैयाँ।

 बैतडीकी बसन्ती जसी दङग भए तेरो रुपरङग धेकी
 क्याई है मुलाई हेरेकि हेरेई ब!  तु त मेरी Fan भयेजसी

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
╰┈➤ Dive into the lyrics of “Young And Beautiful” — a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound — it’s memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Lana Del Rey - Young And Beautiful (Lyrics) ▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|• 3:57
#LanaDelRey #pop #alternative
 
╰┈➤ On this channel, you’ll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

If this song kept you company today:
💌 Share it with someone who needs it
⭐ Subscribe and keep this little corner saved for whenever you want to come back
🫰 Leave a comment telling us which song moves your heart

⤷ ゛follow Lana Del Reyˎˊ˗
Tiktok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lanadelrey
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@LanaDelRey
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Lyrics:
I've seen the world, done it all, had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face, and electric soul
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that you'll let him in
Father, tell me if you can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me, when I'm not young and beautiful?
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Lyrics:
Sun, sun re piya
Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?
Khabar nahi teri na aasraa
Guroor hai tera ya hai khataa meri
Mujhe bata de zara

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

(Hmm)
(Aaa)

Taare, sitaare saare
Maange hai tera pataa
Aur aadhe, adhoore vaade
Leke chal diye ho kahan?

Mere falak ke noor nazaare bhi
Tere kadmon ke dhool se parey nahi
Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa

Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoom

snippet.title: आज नवरात्रि के दूसरे दिन माँ ब्रह्मचारिणी की चमत्कारी कथा सुनने से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती है.....
snippet.description:
#brahmacharinikatha
#brahmacharinigatha
#dusranavratrikatha
#chaitranavratri2026
#ब्रह्मचारिणी_माता_कथा 
#chaitranavratristatus
#maabrahmacharinigatha
#brahmacharinimatakikatha 
#navdurgakatha
#ब्रह्मचारिणी_आरती
#chaitranavratri2026status
#brahmachariniaarti
#brahmachariniMahima
#navratrispecialkatha
#navratribhajan
#navratrigatha
#dusranavratra
#bhaktibarshan

माँ ब्रह्मचारिणी :-
नवरात्रि के दूसरे दिन पूजी जाने वाली, देवी दुर्गा का दूसरा स्वरूप हैं, जो तपस्या, ज्ञान और वैराग्य की देवी मानी जाती हैं। 
माँ ब्रह्मचारिणी की कथा और पूजा से तप, त्याग, वैराग्य, सदाचार और संयम की वृद्धि होती है। यह साधना मानसिक शांति, आत्मविश्वास और दृढ़ संकल्प बढ़ाती है, जिससे कठिन परिस्थितियों में भी मन विचलित नहीं होता। उनकी पूजा से मंगल ग्रह के दोष दूर होते हैं और साधक को ज्ञान-शक्ति मिलती है।

250-JDVT-BDS

भक्ति दर्शन के सुपरहिट भजन/आरतियाँ सुनने के लिए #Bhakti_Darshan को SUBSCRIBE करे व अन्य भक्तो के साथ Share करे व वीडियो को Like करना न भूलें. 

Click to Subscribe - https://goo.gl/4P4Mxk

नवरात्री, Brahmacharini Katha, ब्रह्मचारिणी कथा, Brahmacharini Gatha, ब्रह्मचारिणी आरती, Brahmacharini Aarti, Navratri 2025, Brahmacharini Mata Ki Katha Sunao, नवरात्रि 2025, Chaitra Navratri Special 2025, Durga Maa Ke Bhajan Sunao, Maa Brahmacharini Ki Katha Sunao, Aarti Brahmacharini Mata Ki, Navdurga Ki Katha Sunao, Brahmacharini Mantra, Maa Brahmacharini Mantra, Dusra Navratri Vrat Katha, ब्रह्मचारिणी माता की कथा सुनाओ, दूसरे नवरात्र की कथा, देवी ब्रह्मचारिणी की आरती सुनाओ

मां शैलपुत्री, मां ब्रह्मचारिणी, मां चंद्रघंटा, मां कूष्मांडा, स्कंद माता, मां कात्यायनी, मां कालरात्रि, मां महागौरी, मां सिद्धिदात्री, Shailputri, Brahmacharini, Chandraghanta, Kushmanda, Skandamata, Katyayani, Kalaratri, Mahagauri, Siddhidhatri

माँ ब्रह्मचारिणी :-
नवरात्रि के दूसरे दिन पूजी जाने वाली, देवी दुर्गा का दूसरा स्वरूप हैं, जो तपस्या, ज्ञान और वैराग्य की देवी मानी जाती हैं। 
माँ ब्रह्मचारिणी की कथा और पूजा से तप, त्याग, वैराग्य, सदाचार और संयम की वृद्धि होती है। यह साधना मानसिक शांति, आत्मविश्वास और दृढ़ संकल्प बढ़ाती है, जिससे कठिन परिस्थितियों में भी मन विचलित नहीं होता। उनकी पूजा से मंगल ग्रह के दोष दूर होते हैं और साधक को ज्ञान-शक्ति मिलती है।

Maa Brahmacharini:-
Worshiped on the second day of Navratri, she is the second form of Goddess Durga, who is considered to be the goddess of penance, knowledge and renunciation. 
The story and worship of Maa Brahmacharini increases austerity, renunciation, renunciation, virtue and restraint. This practice increases mental peace, confidence and determination, so that the mind is not distracted even in difficult situations. Their worship removes the defects of Mars and gives the seeker the power of knowledge.

I used to believe
We were burnin' on the edge of somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Somethin' beautiful (Somethin' beautiful)
Sellin' a dream
Smoke and mirrors keep us waitin' on a miracle (Oh)
On a miracle (Oh)

Say, go through the darkest of days
Heaven's a heartbreak away
Never let you go, never let me down
Oh, it's been a hell of a ride
Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]
Don't you give up, nah, nah, nah
I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

Don't fall asleep (Ooh)
At the wheel, we've got a million miles ahead of us
Miles ahead of us
All that we need (Ah)
Is a rude awakening to know we're good enough
(Yeah) Know we're good enough

Heaven's a heartbreak away

Driving the edge of a knife
Never let you go, never let me down

I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

I won't give up, nah, nah, nah
Let me love you
Let me love you

[Bridge: Justin Bieber]
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go (Woah)
No, never let you go (Ooh)
Never let you go, never let you go-go
Never let you go, never let you go-go (Oh no, no, no, no)
Never let you go (Yeah)

[Chorus: Justin Bieber]

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

1, Shoka chhani Timrai saath Pauni
  Sangai Akhaa judhaudai Nidauni

2, Paye bhane mailanthe  chorera
Rati AAi  jhyaal dhoka forera

3, samjhepachhi  message ra call gara 
  maya gatho parnalai balgara
 
4, Timlai bhetna napako jhokama 
  photo taasi  rakham ki chok ma

5,man lagdaina kohi sanga bolna 
  timro yaadle chhodena man polna 

6, mutu jhiki dim jasto bhako chha 
  kaha dekham ra kaha bhetam bhako chha 

7,  matoko ghar  khusiko  chhano 
  tadhaa huda mutumai bhakkano

8, Timro jobaan Deu mmero haatma 
   Barbarauna  thalechhu  raatma 

9, Hunna maaya rupranga  Oth heri 
   Hasi hasi dinchhu ki chot feri 

10, kasle bhanchha chhutida Attinna 
  Yaad le  jati raksile maatinna..

Huri batasa  mayalu kata chha lagchha hatasa , mayalu kata chha lagchha Atyas...
